tables.name: goog_global_mobility_report
tables.comment: Community Mobility Reports aim to provide insights into what has changed in response to policies aimed at combating COVID-19. The reports chart movement trends over time by geography, across different categories of places such as retail and recreation, groceries and pharmacies, parks, transit stations, workplaces, and residential

columns.name: grocery_and_pharmacy_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places like grocery markets, food warehouses, farmers markets, specialty food shops, drug stores, and pharmacies.

columns.name: parks_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places like local parks, national parks, public beaches, marinas, dog parks, plazas, and public gardens.

columns.name: residential_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places like restaurants, cafes, shopping centers, theme parks, museums, libraries, and movie theaters.

columns.name: retail_and_recreation_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places of residence.

columns.name: transit_stations_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places like public transport hubs such as subway, bus, and train stations.

columns.name: workplaces_change_perc
columns.comment: Mobility trends for places of work.
